skills.name: openpact
skills.description: Use a local OpenPact daemon as shared, append-only memory across agent sessions. Read prior decisions before acting, record non-obvious calls, coordinate work via tasks, broadcast status messages.

skills.name: openpact-tools
skills.description: Tool declarations (JSON Schema) for every OpenPact daemon action. Consumable by OpenClaw, LangChain, and MCP clients that load JSON tool specs.
